violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as grape leaves and sauces in the cold drawers. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Raw shelled eggs and raw chicken were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as produce and dairy in the reach-in refrigerators. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
